VAL-SCHED-003.evidence: git diff origin/main shows: scheduling_algorithm.rs — AUDIT comment added, charge() and virtual_deadline() fixed to use u128 intermediate arithmetic and saturating_add to prevent overflow near u64::MAX. per_core.rs — AUDIT comment added, SMP isolation verified (AtomicBool with Release/Acquire ordering), SAFETY comment on MPIDR_EL1 read added. scheduling_context.rs — AUDIT comment added, all arithmetic uses saturating operations, validate_params prevents division-by-zero.
VAL-SCHED-003.notes: scheduling_algorithm.rs had a real bug found and fixed: u64 multiplication overflow in charge() and virtual_deadline(). Now uses u128 intermediate. All three files have // AUDIT: 2026-03-11 markers.
